findings: Official EIA Natural Gas Weekly Update archive pages are date-stamped and include WNGSR-sourced working-gas storage tables with regional and total stocks plus net changes.
Four bounded archive-page probes across 2022-2025 recovered total storage levels and net changes directly from official dated pages.
The archive index is large enough for a later parser/evaluator and exposes about 1507 dated archive links.
Current WNGSR JSON/CSV/TXT endpoints and WNGSR landing page are reachable; current CSV shows exact release-time wording at 10:30 a.m. Eastern.
Current ngshistory/archngshistory/revisions files are not treated as first-vintage proof by themselves because they may represent revised or compiled histories.

Later real-data evaluation must conservatively timestamp each signal after the official release date and standard WNGSR 10:30 a.m. Eastern release convention, with holiday/schedule exceptions audited before trading logic.

compact_artifact_note: Compact source/vintage scout only; no raw data, raw bars, databases, caches, helper scripts, credentials, or command provenance retained.
